concept: Evolve / Develop Gradually / Transform Over Time
description: To develop gradually over time; transformation through accumulated change. 'Molei' names the slow becoming—not sudden shift but patient emergence of new form.
sound_symbolism: The word shifts gradually. 'Mo' moves with slow change, evolution beginning. 'Le' lifts with developmental rise, form emerging. Then 'i' rises to new state achieved.
grammatical_notes: Functions as verb: 'mia molei' (I evolve). Related to 'thuroa' (grow) and 'kelu' (become) but emphasizes gradual transformation across long spans of time.

pillars.solarpunk-values: Social evolution—communities developing toward greater harmony and sustainability.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Evolution as impermanence—constant change as the nature of all phenomena.
